evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.ts, implement Tailwind animation behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses web-tailwind-motion routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific Tailwind CSS guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for Tailwind CSS.
Uses at least one web-tailwind-motion bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.
Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to Tailwind CSS v4 transition, animation, duration, easing, motion-safe/motion-reduce, @theme motion tokens, and static class safety.
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
